.status-bar.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FFFFFF 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FFFFFF, color-mix(in srgb, #FFFFFF 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FFFFFF 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FFFFFF, color-mix(in srgb, #FFFFFF 65%, transparent))

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(250, 250, 250) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(0, 210, 176) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
